'''鈭歬-d-d-h''' ('''kakadehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flatline|flatline]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flatline|flatline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-d-d-h
|-
! Lemma
| kakadehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadehoko|thikadehoko]] || [[word:jikadehoko|jikadehoko]] || [[word:shikadehoko|shikadehoko]] || [[word:kikadehoko|kikadehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukadehoko|thuthukadehoko]] || [[word:jujukadehoko|jujukadehoko]] || [[word:shushukadehoko|shushukadehoko]] || [[word:kukukadehoko|kukukadehoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukadehoko|thukadehoko]] || [[word:jukadehoko|jukadehoko]] || [[word:shukadehoko|shukadehoko]] || [[word:kukadehoko|kukadehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekadehoko|thekadehoko]] || [[word:jekadehoko|jekadehoko]] || [[word:shekadehoko|shekadehoko]] || [[word:kekadehoko|kekadehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokadehoko|thothokadehoko]] || [[word:jojokadehoko|jojokadehoko]] || [[word:shoshokadehoko|shoshokadehoko]] || [[word:kokokadehoko|kokokadehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokadehoko|thokadehoko]] || [[word:jokadehoko|jokadehoko]] || [[word:shokadehoko|shokadehoko]] || [[word:kokadehoko|kokadehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokadehoko|thokadehoko]] || [[word:jokadehoko|jokadehoko]] || [[word:shokadehoko|shokadehoko]] || [[word:kokadehoko|kokadehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kadehoko|th忙kadehoko]] || [[word:j忙kadehoko|j忙kadehoko]] || [[word:sh忙kadehoko|sh忙kadehoko]] || [[word:k忙kadehoko|k忙kadehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakadehoko|thathakadehoko]] || [[word:jajakadehoko|jajakadehoko]] || [[word:shashakadehoko|shashakadehoko]] || [[word:kakakadehoko|kakakadehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadehoko|thakadehoko]] || [[word:jakadehoko|jakadehoko]] || [[word:shakadehoko|shakadehoko]] || [[word:kakadehoko|kakadehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakadehoko|thakadehoko]] || [[word:jakadehoko|jakadehoko]] || [[word:shakadehoko|shakadehoko]] || [[word:kakadehoko|kakadehoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
